channel.title: Eastern Travel Guide — China City Travel Updates
channel.description: Latest travel guides for Chinese cities. Visa updates, new city routes, travel tips, and cultural experiences.

item.title: FAQ Added — China Travel Guide
item.description: Complete travel FAQ: visa policies, best seasons to visit, safety, internet access, transportation, language barriers, budget tips, and packing recommendations.

item.title: City Guides — Now 12 Chinese Cities Covered
item.description: Detailed guides for Beijing, Shanghai, Chengdu, Xi'an, Hangzhou, Guilin, Guangzhou, Chongqing, Shenzhen, Lijiang, Qingdao, and Leshan.
